symptoms: c.Skip("unstable, skip it and fix it before 20210622")
failure_signature: c.Skip("unstable, skip it and fix it before 20210622")
root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates `TestTemporaryTableNoNetwork` from the go-check serial suite to testify (including moving it into a dedicated test file and updating testkit usage). This is a test-infrastructure migration where the main flakiness risk comes from framework/test harness changes and setup/teardown behavior.
fix_pattern: Migrate the test from go-check to testify and isolate it into a dedicated serial test file to reduce framework-related flakiness risk.

evidence: evidence: c.Skip("unstable, skip it and fix it before 20210622")
